testcase.name: test_report_download_md

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: <!DOCTYPE html> <!--[if lt IE 7]> <html class="no-js ie6 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> <!--[if IE 7]> <html class="no-js ie7 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> <!--[if IE 8]> <html class="no-js ie8 oldie" lang="en-US"> <![endif]--> <!--[if gt IE 8]><!--> <html class="no-js" lang="en-US"> <!--<![endif]--> <head>
<title>preview.emergentagent.com | 502: Bad gateway</title> <meta charset="UT assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code"
